#include<stdio.h>
#include<string.h.
#include"structs.h"
#include"globals.h"

void LoadCost(void){
    FILE *fp=fopen("crop_costs.ccsv", "r");


Costcount=0;

while(fscanf(file,"%19[^,],%f,%f,%f,%f,%f\n",
cost[Costcount].crop,
&cost[Costcount].seedCost,
&cost[Costcount].expenses,
&cost[Costcount].msp,
&cost[Costcount].sellingPrice,
&cost[Costcount].yield==6)){
    Costcount++;
    if(Costcount>=20){
        break;
    }
}
fclose(file);
}
